profile_sync_desc: Manage your vault identity and cloud connection.
security_desc: Manage local encryption and data storage.
lock_vault_desc: Clear keys from memory and return to the lock screen.
wipe_data_desc: Permanently delete local database and disconnect.
switch_warning: You are currently connected to {{url}}. Switching will upload your local encrypted data to the new server.
connect_info: Register your local account on the server to enable E2E encrypted cloud sync.
wipe_confirm_desc: This will permanently delete your local database, encryption keys, and log you out. This action cannot be undone.
